title: 安田記念の後に・悔しさを胸に！

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Oguri Cap! Oguri Cap has taken the lead
and... she's passed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Maaan! Oguri's the coolest! She totally kicked our
butts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong. I'm super frustrated that I
lost... but at the same time...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Bamboo Memory.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You were incredible today. Your passion was so
hot, I thought it might burn me... It really pushed
me to perform even better than usual.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's race again someday.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: O-of course! I wouldn't miss it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Until then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How can your eyes still sparkle like that?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We both came face-to-face with the same
unbelievable force, yet I... All I can do is think
about how much stronger she is... and how
powerless I am.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But that unbelievable power of hers is exactly
what makes her such a great rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I have Oguri to block my path and act
as a huge, towering wall that I've got to conquer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The stronger she is, the more exhilarating it'll be
when I finally beat her! It's a seemingly impossible
challenge with a seemingly invincible foe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why, for me, Oguri's not someone who
devours dreams! It's the total opposite!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She's like a towering GIANT, egging me on to
take her down! She's the one who lit this fire in
me, and now my dreams and I both burn bright!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I never realized how different the two of
us are.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suppose at some point I must have forgotten the
mindset necessary to take on such towering
adversaries.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Do you think I can do it as well?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Can I face strong opponents head-on the way you
do?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course you can!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: After all, you're the one who taught me that you can improve yourself by facing strong opponents in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall reclaim my initial mindset and set out once
more to face mighty opponents.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll continue chasing my dream!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Look at Yaeno's face! Doesn't she look a little
more positive? Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she sensed the same thing that we did
from Bamboo's run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There is simply no one more dedicated to her
dreams than Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's like watching her gives you the strength
to chase your own!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I couldn't agree more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I finally get back to
campus. She was quieter than usual on our way
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But suddenly, she stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You were incredible today. Your passion was so
hot, I thought it might burn me... It really pushed
me to perform even better than usual.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's race again someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I look back, I notice tears welling up in her
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do you a—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Agh, why are my eyes all watery?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, hold on! I'm fine, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm totally fine! I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After all this time, I was fiiinally able to throw
everything I had at Oguri in a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It just makes me sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without warning, large tears start spilling down
Bamboo Memory's face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is not only the quietest I've ever seen her,
but also the most raw and emotional.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! From the moment I started running, it's
always been my destiny to face her!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She's the one who stands at the very center of my
dream. She's my ultimate rival—a part of my story!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So maybe that's why...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I wanna be a part of Oguri Cap's story too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I want her and everyone else to say Bamboo Memory is Oguri Cap's ultimate rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's who I want to be!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I want to run in the Sprinters
Stakes next!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There, I'll prove myself as the best sprinter ever!
I'll become the best version of myself and
someone worthy of being Oguri's rival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's passion is so strong, I can feel
my own eyes begin to water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, this is where I have to step up! If
she wants to become Oguri Cap's rival, then I
know just what she needs to do!
choice_data_list: Let's run in the Takarazuka Kinen first.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But that's a medium-distance race!
choice_data_list: It'll definitely be tough on you, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But?
choice_data_list: Chiyono O and Yaeno will be there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And not just them. The best racers in this
generation are sure to make an appearance. The
Takarazuka Kinen is a grand prix, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has nurtured an increasingly
strong passion for her dream thanks to the time
she's spent with Yaeno Muteki and the rest of her
peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she competes in a race where so many of her
generation's dreams collide...
choice_data_list: I know it'll make you even stronger!
I know it'll make you even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay, then! Takarazuka Kinen, here I come!
